title: Semantic Communication Through the Lens of Context-Dependent Channel Modeling

sections.text: [1] C. E. Shannon, "A mathematical theory of communication," Bell Syst. Tech. J., vol. 27, no. 3, pp. 379-423, 1948. [2] L. Floridi, "Philosophical Conceptions of Information. In: G. Weaver, "The Mathematical Theory of Commu- nication," Urbana, IL, USA:Univ. Illinois Press, 1949. [4] R. Carnap, and Y. Bar-Hillel, "An outline of a theory of semantic information," Oct. 1952. [5] L.
